short_summary: Timothy Keith Moore (born October 2, 1970) is an American attorney and politician who has been the U.S. representative for North Carolina's 14th congressional district since 2025. He previously served as speaker of the North Carolina House of Representatives from 2015 to 2025. A Republican, Moore represented the 111th State House District, which includes Cleveland County. Moore was first elected to the state House in 2002.

prior_positions.position: Speaker of the North Carolina House of Representatives
